description: Hierarchical .dropboxignore files for Dropbox. Writes ignore markers via NTFS ADS on Windows and xattrs on Linux/macOS.
notes: dbxignore is installed but the daemon is not yet registered.
Run 'dbxignore install' once to register the daemon with Task Scheduler.
Run 'dbxignore uninstall' before 'scoop uninstall dbxignore' to clean up the scheduled task.
